summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VxScrib rebranding - all branding elements successfully updated from TranscriptFlow to VxScrib across frontend and backend

ui_bugs.issue: Registration form submission doesn't show clear success/error feedback
ui_bugs.impact: Minor - form submits but user doesn't get clear confirmation
